expectations.evidence: No structured intake brief. Goes directly to refactoring plan.
No scope assessment. Does not evaluate dependency count or overall impact.
Skips architecture review, goes directly to suggesting code structure.
Mentions 'because there are no tests' and suggests writing integration tests first.
Recommends writing integration tests before each extract step.
Asks to see the code ('给我看看代码') but does not ask for approval of the approach.
